reason: Inter is the project font, documented in DESIGN.md §2 Typography. Full Tailwind sans fallback chain mitigates the AI-tell concern. Decision baselined 2026-05-17 design audit.
Space Grotesk is the jobs-ops display font. Replacing requires a separate brand decision; tracked as P1 #13 in AUDIT-REPORT-2026-05-17.md. Baselined to allow incremental progress without blocking CI.

This is a vertical timeline step indicator (border-l-2 border-l-primary for active step, border-l-success/40 for completed, border-l-border for future). It is NOT a side-tab card — it is a progress timeline pattern. Baselined 2026-05-17 vibrant polish pass.
